name: USB-C-Supercharger for Mighty+ & Venty
summary: USB-C-Supercharger for Mighty+ & Venty — a battery accessory for keeping your device powered.
description: The USB-C-Supercharger for Mighty+ & Venty includes four interchangeable plugs (UK, US, EU, AUS) to optimise charging speed and allow for use in any location. This makes it ideal for frequent travelers using their Mighty+ and Venty, even when their battery is low. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience using the product. Keeps your device charged and ready.
